HomeDestinationsRishikhola
West Bengal

Rishikhola

The Riverside Camping Paradise

Riverside camp under a canopy of stars, fireflies dancing above the water as the fire crackles.

4.4
(87 reviews)
Kalimpong, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
22°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Rishikhola is a beautiful riverside village along the Rishi River, perfect for camping, fishing, and riverside relaxation.

History

A quiet village that has recently become popular for riverside camping and nature tourism.

Altitude

900 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Kalimpong, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Nature

Rishi River

Crystal clear river with boulders and camping spots.

Heritage

Samsing Tea Garden

Picturesque tea gardens nearby.

KuboVista

Secret Fishing Spot

A quiet spot perfect for angling.

Why visit: Peaceful and abundant with trout

Viewpoints

sunset

Riverside Sunset Point

Sunset over the Rishi River.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Riverside Kitchen

4.1

Local & BBQ • ₹300-500

Freshly cooked meals by the river.

Cafes

River Cafe

4.0

Specialty: Fresh Juice

Refreshing drinks by the river.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Camping Gear Rental

Rent camping equipment.

TentsSleeping bagsFishing gear

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Riverside Camping

Easy

Camp by the Rishi River.

Overnight
₹2,000

Fishing

Easy

3 hrs
₹800

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
